common.name: Name

validation.helixPublishInvalid: Rollout ID, batch ID, and manifest version are required.
validation.helixTargetsRequired: Provide at least one target node ID.
validation.hostFormInvalid: Name, address, and a valid port are required.
validation.profileFormInvalid: Name, profile type, and content are required.
validation.serverFormInvalid: Name, address, and a valid port are required.
validation.snippetFormInvalid: Name, snippet type, and content are required.

overview.title: Infrastructure Control
overview.description: Operational command surface for servers, edge hosts, rollout transport, configuration profiles, and low-level runtime controls.
overview.routesDescription: Jump directly into the exact infrastructure surface you need without leaving the admin console.
overview.healthDescription: Current service health across backend components and operator-facing infrastructure dependencies.
overview.serversDescription: Most relevant server records with current online state and active session count.
overview.helixDescription: Helix rollout inventory, host inventory, and profile footprint in one place.
overview.platformPulseDescription: High-level system counters pulled from monitoring to orient the operator before deeper actions.

routes.servers: Provision, edit, and retire server nodes while tracking live usage and traffic.
routes.hosts: Manage SNI, ALPN, headers, and path mappings used by delivery hosts.
routes.configProfiles: Control exported client profile templates and default delivery behavior.
routes.nodePlugins: Operate node plugin inventory, configuration payloads, and execution commands.
routes.xray: Inspect and update raw Xray runtime configuration from the admin surface.
routes.helix: Publish rollouts, inspect assignments, and review transport profile state.

servers.title: Servers Console
servers.description: Create, edit, and retire server nodes while keeping an eye on status, traffic, and live users.
servers.createDescription: Register a new server node with its public address and operator-facing label.
servers.editDescription: Adjust the selected server record when addressing network or naming changes.

hosts.title: Hosts Console
hosts.description: Operate delivery hosts, TLS metadata, path routing, and disablement state used by config delivery.
hosts.createDescription: Add a new host definition with TLS metadata and optional path/header overrides.
hosts.editDescription: Update the selected host when addressing SNI, header, or path changes.

configProfiles.title: Config Profiles
configProfiles.description: Maintain delivery profile templates used for exported VPN client configurations.
configProfiles.createDescription: Define a profile type, its exported config payload, and whether it should be the default.

nodePlugins.title: Node Plugins
nodePlugins.description: Manage plugin inventory, configuration payloads, cloning, and direct execution commands against nodes.
nodePlugins.selectionRequired: Select a plugin before saving changes.
nodePlugins.selectionEmpty: Select a plugin to edit its configuration payload.

xray.title: Xray Console
xray.description: Inspect and update raw Xray configuration directly from the admin panel.

helix.title: Helix Console
helix.description: Publish rollouts, inspect rollout state, preview node assignments, and monitor transport profiles.
helix.assignmentEmpty: Select a node to preview its Helix assignment.

inbounds.title: Inbounds Console
inbounds.description: Browse inbound listeners, attached nodes, security settings, and full inbound payloads.
inbounds.detailEmpty: Select an inbound to inspect its full payload.

squads.title: Squads Console
squads.description: Operate internal and external squads used for grouping and rollout-oriented targeting.
squads.createDescription: Create a new squad for grouping, rollout scoping, or access segmentation.
squads.empty: No squads found for this view.

snippets.title: Snippets Console
snippets.description: Maintain reusable configuration snippets and their execution order for delivery pipelines.
snippets.createDescription: Add a reusable config snippet with type, raw content, and optional ordering.
